description_long: This hammer features a large, rectangular head with a textured, icy blue appearance, adorned with white streaks and bubble-like markings that give it a stylized, almost magical look. The head is blocky and slightly irregular, suggesting it is crafted from a solid, stone-like or crystalline material. The handle is straight and cylindrical, colored in a warm brown with visible wood grain patterns, indicating it is made of wood. The transition between the head and handle is marked by a dark collar, possibly for reinforcement. The hammer's overall proportions are oversized compared to typical hand tools, making it appear more like a sledgehammer or a fantasy-themed tool. There are no visible brand markings, wear, or additional attachments on the hammer.
description: A large, blocky hammer with an icy blue, textured head and a straight wooden handle featuring visible grain patterns.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, flat face of the icy blue hammer head and the full width of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the rectangular depth of the head and the handle extending directly downward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back face of the hammer head, similar in size and texture to the front, with the handle centered below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the elongated side of the head and the continuation of the wood-grain handle.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle with visible grain texture, cylindrical and smooth, no ergonomic enhancements
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledge-type head, blocky with flat striking faces, stylized as icy or crystalline with no claws or peen
